commit_message: Fix incorrect TR1 transition Fix incorrect TR1 transition On TMS bit "1", the transition from UPDATE_IR should be to SELECT_DR_SCAN instead of SELECT_IR_SCAN

examples.commit_message: Fix incorrect TR1 transition Fix incorrect TR1 transition On TMS bit "1", the transition from UPDATE_IR should be to SELECT_DR_SCAN instead of SELECT_IR_SCAN
examples.patch:
@@ -167,7 +167,7 @@ class JTag:
         (RUN_TEST_IDLE, SELECT_DR_SCAN, SELECT_IR_SCAN, 
          TEST_LOGIC_RESET, TEST_LOGIC_RESET),
         (CAPTURE_DR, EXIT_1_DR, UPDATE_DR, SELECT_DR_SCAN),
-        (CAPTURE_IR, EXIT_1_IR, UPDATE_IR, SELECT_IR_SCAN),
+        (CAPTURE_IR, EXIT_1_IR, UPDATE_IR, SELECT_DR_SCAN),
         (SHIFT_DR, EXIT_1_DR), (SHIFT_IR, EXIT_1_IR),
         (PAUSE_DR, EXIT_2_DR, UPDATE_DR),
         (PAUSE_IR, EXIT_2_IR, UPDATE_IR) ]
